Package neqsim.process.chemistry.scale

package neqsim.process.chemistry.scale
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.process.chemistry
     
  • Class
    Description
    ClosedLoopDepositionSolver
    Closed-loop deposition-flow solver.
    ElectrolyteScaleCalculator
    Activity-coefficient-corrected scale prediction calculator that bridges electrolyte thermodynamics into the saturation index calculation.
    ScaleControlAssessor
    Combines a ScalePredictionCalculator with one or more ScaleInhibitorPerformance models to estimate the residual scaling risk after chemical treatment.
    ScaleDepositionAccumulator
    Integrates scale-deposition risk along a PipeBeggsAndBrills segmented pipeline by evaluating an ScalePredictionCalculator at each segment temperature and pressure, then estimating cumulative deposit thickness on the wall and time-to-blockage.
    ScaleInhibitorPerformance
    Empirical performance model for oilfield scale inhibitors.
    ScaleInhibitorPerformance.InhibitorChemistry
    Scale inhibitor chemistry family.
    ScaleInhibitorPerformance.ScaleType
    Mineral scale type.
